case_title: YUEN, DR., STEPHEN vs. BUTCHER, LYNNE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUEN, DR., STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT BUTCHER, LYNNE DOES I-X SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BUTCHER, LYNNE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT BUTCHER, LYNNE
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUEN, DR., STEPHEN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-01-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-08-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SUBSEQUENT MEMO TO SET FILED BY DEFENDANT BUTCHER, LYNNE DOES I-X

DR. STEPHEN YUEN JOSEPH A. SACRAMENTO, ESQ. VS. LYNNE BUTCHER, ET AL. ADAM N. BARASCH, ESQ. 3:45 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT, EXCEPT PLTF. WHO WAS REPRESENTED BY HIS ATTORNEY OF RECORD, JOSEPH A. SACRAMENTO, ESQ. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PLTF. TO HAVE RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 1177 CALIFORNIA STREET #703 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. AS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT LYNNE BUTCHER. WRIT MAY ISSUE NOW, STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 10/1/93. PLTF. TO PAY $4,500.00 TO DEFENDANT IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY 10/1/93. PLTF. TO RETURN THE SECURITY DEPOSIT AND KEY DEPOSIT AS REQUIRED BY LAW. THERE IS A MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS ARISING OUT OF THE LAND- LORD TENANT RELATIONSHIP OF THE PARTIES. PLTF. TO RETAIN PROPERTY LEFT IN THE PREMISE AFTER 10/1/93. DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE COPY OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FROM PLTF TO SIGN. SEE REPORTER NOTES FOR FURTHER DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTCHER, LYNNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1177 CALIFORNIA STREET, APT 703, S.F., STAYED UNTIL OCT-01-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF SHALL RETURN $4,500.00 TO DEFT ATTY'S OFFICE ONE WEEK PRIOR TO VACATING. PLTF SHALL RETURN DEFT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE DRV IS $25.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUEN, DR., STEPHEN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BUTCHER, LYNNE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BUTCHER, LYNNE
